caption: A computer screen displays a video conferencing call overlaid on a complex conceptual map. The map consists of various circular icons and text labels connected by blue lines on a black background, featuring labels such as "Deep Ecology," "Social Ecology," and "Integral Ecology." In the upper right corner, a man wearing a dark baseball cap is visible in a small video window. Across the top of the screen, multiple browser tabs are open, with titles including "Trust & Learning by Systemantics," "Insights I Introduction to Systems," and "Root Community Food System." As the sequence progresses, a rectangular advertisement appears over the left side of the conceptual map. The advertisement features a red and white beer label with the text "BEER" and the phrase "A TIME FOR CHANGE" printed in bold, white capital letters against a red background.
